readelf --dyn-syms libmonosgen-2.0.so 2>/dev/null | awk '$4 == "FUNC" && $2 != "0000000000000000"' | sort -k2 > /tmp/symbols/dynsyms.txt

# Find symbols for each address
for addr in 0x222098 0x222234 0x19bac0 0x19bc14; do
  dec_addr=$((addr))
  # Find the symbol whose address is <= our target and closest
  match=$(awk -v target="$dec_addr" '{
    addr = strtonum("0x"$2)
    size = strtonum($3)
    if (addr <= target && (target < addr + size || size == 0)) {
      offset = target - addr
      printf "%s+0x%x", $8, offset
    }
  }' /tmp/symbols/dynsyms.txt | tail -1)
